chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1579 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on MA-13573/2016 3. For katcha peshi. 07.11.2016. Mr. Anwar Rajput, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel a/w SIP Muhammad Changal o/b of SSP Hyderabad, ASI Noor Muhammad o/b of SHO Hussainabad, ASI Sabir Ahmed and P.C Naveed Ahmed of P.S Hussainabad = Today, the learned State Counsel has filed detailed parawise reply in which it has been mentioned that criminal case agaisnt Asad Ali S/o Wajid Ali Shaikh, the present petitioner, has been registered in which challan has also been submitted before the concerned Court. Be that as it may, under the garb of investigation, the official respondents cannot take excessive measures against the petitioner including against his running business of restaurant. The police officials/respondents are required to investigate the case in a due diligent manner, but at the same time the petitioner if doing a lawful business, which is his one of the fundamental rights under the Constitution of Pakistan, cannot be coerced to close the same. The police officials/respondents in the circumstances should conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and shall not harass the petitioner. With these observations, instant constitutional petition stands disposed of with a note of caution that if official respondents will attempt to take undue advantage of their position then it will be construed as a violation of this order. JUDGE Shahid
